tasks.title: Create src/cli.ts with --version/-v; prove TS+Jest pipeline
tasks.notes: Created src/cli.ts with --version/-v flag. Created tests/cli.test.ts with 3 smoke tests. npm run build succeeded, dist/cli.js exists. All 3 tests pass. npm run lint passes.

tasks.title: Add validateNonBlank helper and validation unit tests
tasks.notes: Appended validateNonBlank function to src/utils/validation.ts. Appended validateNonBlank describe block to tests/validation.test.ts with 4 test cases (non-blank passes, empty string throws, whitespace-only throws, non-string throws). All tests pass. npm run lint passes.

tasks.title: Extend cli.ts with help command and input validation
tasks.notes: Replaced placeholder src/cli.ts with full implementation per D2-D7. Imports validateNonBlank from ./utils/validation. Implements D3 flag precedence: --version/-v first, then help/--help/-h, then positional validation, then no-arg fallback to help. Uses console.log for stdout and process.stderr.write for stderr. All 4 smoke checks pass: --version prints version, help/--help print help text with Usage:, empty string arg exits 1 with 'must not be empty or blank' on stderr. All 3 existing cli.test.ts tests pass. npm run lint passes.

tasks.title: Add full tests/cli.test.ts covering all three features
tasks.notes: Added 6 new test cases covering --version precedence, help command, --help, -h flags, and empty/whitespace validation. All 9 tests pass. npm run lint passes. Commit 5c94626.

tasks.title: Wire pretest script in package.json
tasks.notes: Added 'pretest': 'npm run build' to scripts section. npm test now automatically rebuilds dist/ before running tests. Verified all 34 tests pass. Commit d8667df.

tasks.title: VERIFY: build + lint + full test suite
